case_title: JEANNE C. BLAMEY ET AL VS. GILLIAN SHENON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLAMEY, JEANNE C. FRAM, ROBERT D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHENON, GILLIAN $8,348.22 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,438.22 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,348.22 FILED BY BLAMEY, JEANNE C. FRAM, ROBERT D. AS TO DEFENDANT SHENON, GILLIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLAMEY, JEANNE C. FRAM, ROBERT D. AS TO DEFENDANT SHENON, GILLIAN
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION (FEE: $171.64) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLAMEY, JEANNE C. FRAM, ROBERT D. SERVED MAY-28-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHENON, GILLIAN

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR - PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. "THE PARTIES HAVE ENTERED INTO AN INSTALLMENT PAYMENT PLAN. SEE ATTACHED. IF THERE IS A DEFAULT IN PAYMENT, THE REMAINING BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT BECOMES DUE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $500.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $864.60 ACCRUED INTEREST, $60.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT SHENON, GILLIAN
DECLARATION OF JEANNE C. BLAMEY RE: ADDRESS UPDATE FOR DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLAMEY, JEANNE C. FRAM, ROBERT D.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR WRIT ISSUED ON 04/20/17. AS TO DEFENDANT SHENON, GILLIAN
RETURN MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT GILLIAN SHENON - UNABLE TO FORWARD
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SHENON, GILLIAN HEARING SET FOR JUN-13-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

ORDER ON DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS: INSTALLMENT PAYMENT PLAN OF JUNE 13, 2016 IS TERMINATED AND AND THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT IS COLLECTIBLE. ON JUNE 13, 2016, THE COURT ORDER THAT THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAYMENTS OF $500.00 ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING JULY 1, 2016 UNTIL DECEMBER 1, 2017, AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT $158.68. ON AUGUST 30, 2016, JUDGMENT CREDITOR JEANNE BLAMEY INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAD NOT MADE ONE OR MORE PAYMENTS.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLAMEY, JEANNE C. FRAM, ROBERT D. AS TO DEFENDANT SHENON, GILLIAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SIGNED SERVED FEB-05-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHENON, GILLIAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2016 - JUDGMENT.
RETURN MAIL - ORDER OF EXAMINATION - OFF CALENDAR ORDER SENT TO DEFENDANT
(SC-223) DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLAMEY, JEANNE C. AS TO DEFENDANT SHENON, GILLIAN
